CONTENT.Club career: On 27 May 2024, it was announced that Allevinah had signed a three-year contract with newly-promoted Ligue 1 club Angers.

CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Allevinah elected to represent Gabon at the senior international level. He made his international debut on 23 March 2019 against Burundi, starting and playing the full 90 minutes of the 1–1 draw, which eliminated Gabon from Africa Cup of Nations qualification.On 5 September 2021, he scored his first goal in a 1–1 draw against Egypt in a FIFA World Cup qualifier. Two months later, he scored against Egypt again in the reverse fixture, which Egypt won 2–1.Allevinah was selected for Gabon's 2021 Africa Cup of Nations squad. He played in all three of Gabon's group stage matches, scoring a late equalizer against Ghana and the opening goal of the draw against Morocco to help Gabon advance to the knockout stage.

SUMMARY: Jim Émilien Ngowet Allevinah (born 27 February 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for  Ligue 1 club Angers. Born in France, he plays for the Gabon national team.
